curation.synopsis: With Imperium Secundus collapsed and the brotherhood of the lost triumvirate scattering for the war-front, Roboute Guilliman drives his fleet toward the heart of the rebellion. A vision granted to Sanguinius has confirmed the Emperor still lives, and the architect of Secundus carries that knowledge as a wound — convinced that, for all his good intentions, he is no less a traitor than the warriors he must now hunt. When a host of World Eaters falls on Diavanos, a world that embodies the ideals of the Imperium he meant to build, he sees the chance he has been hunting for: a clean fight, a clean enemy, a clean price for the sin he carries. What follows is a grinding boarding action in which the Ultramarines pour their grief and anger into the boltguns and blades of their primarch.
